items.briefing:
Australian businesses are rapidly adopting AI tools, including newly launched products like ChatGPT Work and GPT-5.6, but security experts warn this rush is outpacing proper risk management. Staff should be mindful of what information they share with AI platforms, particularly sensitive student or organisational data. Separately, Microsoft has patched a zero-day vulnerability called RoguePlanet — if your organisation uses Microsoft products, ensure updates are applied as soon as possible.

**Practical tip:** Before using any new AI tool at work, check with your manager or IT team that it has been approved for handling organisational or student information.

featured.title: ACSC warns of large-scale campaign exploiting CMS vulnerabilities in Australia
featured.quote: ACSC warns Australian organizations of widespread CMS vulnerability exploitation campaign.
